text.title: ELK Stack Architecture and Deployment Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: estimate-volume
step.action: GB/day in + retention + replication factor = total storage.

step.name: design-roles
step.action: Split master (3) / data-hot (≥2) / data-warm (≥1 if retention>30d) / coordinating (≥2 for large).

step.name: tier-sizing
step.action: Hot 7d (SSD), warm 30d (EBS gp3), cold 90+d (searchable snapshot to S3).

step.name: pick-deployment
step.action: ECK if K8s, Elastic Cloud / OpenSearch Service if SaaS. Docker Compose ONLY for dev/test.

step.name: deploy-and-test
step.action: Apply manifest; run a sustained 2x peak load test; verify cluster green + heap stable.
